# tmp_autmog_pen_images

Images associated with the latest Autmog pen record.

## Columns

| Column | Type | Required | Key | Default | Relation | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `bigint` | yes | PK |  |  | Internal image row identifier. | `1000` |
| `pen_id` | `bigint` | yes | FK |  | `tmp_autmog_pens.id` (on delete cascade) | Autmog pen row this image belongs to. | `1000` |
| `alt_text` | `text` | no |  |  |  | Source image alt text, when provided by Shopify. | `Titanium click pen side profile` |
| `width` | `integer` | no |  |  |  | Uploaded ImageKit image width in pixels. | `2000` |
| `height` | `integer` | no |  |  |  | Uploaded ImageKit image height in pixels. | `1333` |
| `source_hash` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Stable hash of the source image identity used to dedupe image rows for the pen. | `sha256:db2ef0e97513c1dc9d75f55ee8c014c06fc31a459c1c25b12904696bf2ab1c55` |

| `status` | `text` | yes |  | `'pending_upload'` |  | Image upload/delete lifecycle status. | `uploaded` |
| `uploaded_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | no |  |  |  | Timestamp when the image upload completed. | `2026-07-17T20:45:42.000Z` |
| `pending_delete_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | no |  |  |  | Timestamp when the image was marked for deletion. | `2026-07-18T20:45:42.000Z` |
| `deleted_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | no |  |  |  | Timestamp when the image delete completed. | `2026-07-18T20:46:12.000Z` |
| `last_seen_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | yes |  | `now()` |  | Timestamp when the source image last appeared upstream. | `2026-07-17T20:45:00.000Z` |
| `created_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | yes |  | `now()` |  | Timestamp when the image row was created. | `2026-07-17T20:45:00.000Z` |
